chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-915 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Prority) 1.For orders on CMA 6608/25 2.For orders on CMA 6609/25 3.For orders on o/objections 4.For orders on statement dt.1.10.25 5.For hearing of CMA 3917/25 6.For hearing of main case 01-10-2025 Mr. Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. **** This matter is already fixed on 16.10.2025 as date by Court; however, by filing urgent application and application for antedating the matter, counsel for petitioner pleads urgency on the ground that he has also filed statement dated 01.10.2025 for withdrawal of instant petition as the petitioner intends to avail his remedy before the proper Bench of this Court. Order accordingly. This petition along with listed applications is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
